name: website-shower
description: Read-only website maintenance audit that turns repo signals into an approval-ready cleanup checklist.

interface.longDescription: Maps a website repo, runs read-only maintenance scanners, and writes a grouped cleanup checklist with evidence, boundaries, change risk, and validation steps.
defaultPrompt: Audit this website repo with Website Shower.
Write website-shower-report.md with inspected scope, grouped cleanup tasks, file evidence, boundary markers when useful, change risk, and validation steps.
